---
title: "testing_eval"
author: "DWH"
date: "2026-04-07"
output: html_document
---


## packages and functions 

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(RHESSysIOinR)

#functions 
source("../read_plot_rhessys_fun.R")

#read in validation csv
target_df <- read_csv("../Target_Data_comp/TargetData_15mar26.csv") |> 
  rename(date = Date)

```

## Look at basin level output for with stream routing vs without


```{r}
#with routing

# dat = readin_rhessys_output(outname)
# z <- dat$bd
read_plot_rhessys(outname = "C:/Users/dwh18/OneDrive/Desktop/R_Projects/RHESSys_development/RHESSys_Tutorial/HPB_files_NewMaps/out/RouteTest100yr/hpb_RouteTest_1", 
                  date_filter = as.Date("1960-01-01"), ncol = 5, validate = F)


#no routing 
read_plot_rhessys(outname = "C:/Users/dwh18/OneDrive/Desktop/R_Projects/RHESSys_development/RHESSys_Tutorial/HPB_files_NewMaps/out/RouteTest100yr/hpb_RouteTest_NOROUTE", 
                  date_filter = as.Date("1960-01-01"), ncol = 5, validate = F)

```



```{r}

##read in streamrouting 
col_names <- c("day","month","year","reachID","Qout","lateralinput","Qin","waterdepth","reservoir.store","NO3_out","NH4_out","DON_out","DOC_out")

df <- read.table("C:/Users/dwh18/OneDrive/Desktop/R_Projects/RHESSys_development/RHESSys_Tutorial/HPB_files_NewMaps/out/RouteTest100yr/hpb_RouteTest_1_streamrouting.daily",
                 header = TRUE, col.names = col_names, fill = TRUE)
head(df)

df |> 
  mutate(date = ymd(paste(year, month, day, sep = "-"))) |> 
  select(date, everything()) |> 
  pivot_longer(-c(1:5)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = value, color = as.factor(reachID)))+
  geom_point()+ facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free_y")+ theme_bw()
  
```
